message:
test(fixtures): update share CLI help fixture with static-export and deploy subcommands

Add newly-implemented static-export and deploy subcommands to the
share CLI help golden fixture, keeping it in sync with the actual
CLI output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,7 +7,9 @@ Commands:
   verify
   decrypt
   wizard
-  help     Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)
+  static-export
+  deploy
+  help           Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)
 
 Options:
   -h, --help  Print help
